steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The task is to begin a narrative about Merle Oberon's life. A narrative opening must establish who the subject is and where and when her story starts — not jump ahead to achievements or episodes.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — birthplace and birth year: gives Mumbai (then Bombay) and 1911 — the biographical starting point a narrative opening requires. ✓
  • Choice B — achievements and films: skips ahead to career highlights without establishing an origin. ✗
  • Choice C — a single episode: drops into one moment mid-story rather than opening the narrative. ✗
  • Choice D — career pattern: sketches a professional arc without grounding the reader in a narrative beginning. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
